name: Search Filter Bar
description: Search input with type and namespace dropdown filters for browsing registry content. Supports real-time search, type tabs, namespace dropdown, and sort controls.

standard.description: Full search bar with search input, content type tabs (All/Patterns/Themes/Blueprints/etc.), namespace dropdown, and sort select.

slots.search-row: Search Input with icon prefix and clear Button on the right
slots.filter-row: Horizontal row: type Chip tabs on left, namespace Select and sort Select on right
slots.active-filters: Optional row of active filter Badges with remove (x) action

compact.description: Single-row compact search with inline type and namespace dropdowns. No tabs.

with-results-count.description: Search bar with result count summary and active filter pills below.

slots.results-summary: Result count text and active filter Badge pills with remove action
slots.clear-all: Clear all filters Button when filters are active

visual_brief: Two-row filter bar. The first row contains a search input with a magnifying glass icon on the left. The second row contains type filter tabs (All, Patterns, Themes, Blueprints, Shells) rendered as pill-shaped toggles, a namespace dropdown selector, and a sort dropdown (Relevance, Newest, Popular). Active filter selections appear as removable chip badges below the bar. The compact preset combines search and filters into a single row. The with-results-count preset adds a 'Showing N results' label.

responsive.mobile: Search input full-width on its own row. Type tabs become a horizontal scrollable strip. Namespace and sort collapse into a 'Filters' button that opens a bottom sheet.
responsive.tablet: Search and filters fit in two rows. Type tabs visible. Dropdowns inline.
responsive.desktop: Single or two row bar with all controls visible. Type tabs, namespace, and sort all inline.
